quoteFirst: The clouds of yesterday passed over with only a few drops of rain just after starting. Today cloudy again; wind from east by north; started at
quoteLast: As the horses came in to water, just before starting, we found that the horse Jamie had come up during the night but looks hardly able to drag his legs after him. It is a great pity as he is a splendid hackney and is a great loss at present.
title: McKinlay's Journal of Exploration in the Interior of Australia
author: McKinlay, John, 1819-1872
